_comment: Source map for ci/sync-releases.py. Metadata is read from the private Gitea host (loopback) and written source-free to releases/data/. Binaries are published to the PUBLIC GitHub Releases hub (AuditToolkitLabs/releases) with per-product namespaced tags '<slug>-<tag>'. A release's assets only get a working download_url once that tag exists on GitHub. Add the other 7 products here after the SIP prototype is approved.

products.name: Storage Intelligence Platform
products.blurb: Distributed storage inventory, classification, and change-tracking.

products.name: Audit Admin Toolkit
products.blurb: Cross-platform security audit server with fleet, standalone, and hypervisor agents.
products._note: Model A (data-driven page), converted from the Model-B portal link-out on 2026-07-03 so the releases page presents v1.0.4 inline with GitHub-hub downloads, matching the other platform tools (ACC etc.). exclude_prereleases hides v1.0.0-rc.1; the legacy 6.4.x betas remain in Gitea but are not on the hub, so they list without a download link.

products.name: Litmus
products.blurb: Agentless asset-based compliance audit, remediation, and reporting.

products.name: Linux Host Lite
products.blurb: Lightweight Linux host security baseline auditing and reporting.

products.name: Windows Security Lite
products.blurb: Lightweight Windows endpoint security baseline auditing and reporting.

products.name: macOS Security Lite
products.blurb: Lightweight macOS endpoint security baseline auditing and reporting.

products.name: Switch Exposure Centre
products.blurb: Network switch exposure intelligence with advisory, CVE, and KEV correlation.
products._note: display_rewrites normalises the mirrored release title/notes to the UK 'Centre' spelling (case-sensitive spaced form only — never matches the lowercase-hyphenated artifact filenames). exclude_prereleases: v1.0.3 GA is the baseline for the 6 main tools; the v1.0.0-rc.1 stays in Gitea but is never mirrored/published/shown.

products.name: Audit Assurance Node
products.blurb: Distributed satellite/relay execution coordinator for parallel, fleet-scale audit collection with signed evidence bundles.
products._note: exclude_prereleases: show only stable/GA releases on the site. The v1.0.0-rc.1 pre-release stays in Gitea but is never mirrored/published/shown.

products.name: Linux Security Lite
products.blurb: Linux-first security baseline auditing with 500 scripts across 11 control domains.
products._note: exclude_prereleases: show only stable/GA releases on the site. The v1.0.0-rc.1 pre-release stays in Gitea but is never mirrored/published/shown.

products.name: CMDB API Data Collection Tool
products.blurb: CMDB inventory and configuration data collection with API-driven ingestion.
products._note: exclude_prereleases: v1.0.4 GA is the baseline for the 6 main tools; the v1.0.0-rc.1 stays in Gitea but is never mirrored/published/shown.

products.name: Asset Command Centre
products.blurb: Centralised asset inventory and control plane for the audit fleet.
products._note: exclude_prereleases: v1.0.4 GA is the baseline for the 6 main tools; the v1.0.0-rc.1 stays in Gitea but is never mirrored/published/shown. NOTE: asset-command-centre-releases.html not yet created — site card link pending page creation.
